person.name: Agnes Danvers
person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
Biography
Agnes Danvers was born circa 1445 at London, Middlesex, England.

Marriage & Children
She married Sir Walter Dennis, Escheator & Sheriff of Gloucestershire, son of Maurice Dennis, Esq., Sheriff of Gloucestershire and Katherine (Joan) Stradling, before 1467.

They had 3 sons & 3 daughters:
1.) Sir William

2.) Richard

3.) John

4.) Anne

5.) Jane

6.) Katherine

zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Danvers於1445年1月1日出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾艾普維爾時，她的父親Robert Danvers41歲，母親Agnes de La Bere25歲。她於大約1464年與Walter Dennys在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾代哈姆結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1518年10月22日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾阿爾維斯頓享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: Danvers
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Leicestershire): of Norman origin, a habitational name with fused preposition d(e) for someone from Anvers, the French name of the port of Antwerp in what is now Belgium.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Danvers was born on 1 January 1445, in Epwell, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Danvers, was 41 and her mother, Agnes de La Bere, was 25. She married Walter Dennys about 1464, in Dyrham, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 22 October 1518, in Alveston, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Danvers est née le 1 janvier 1445, à Epwell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Danvers, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Agnes de La Bere, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Dennys environ 1464, à Dyrham, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 octobre 1518, à Alveston, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 73 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Danversが1445年1月1日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアエプウエルで生まれた時，父Robert Danversは41歳，母Agnes de La Bereは25歳であった。約1464年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアディルハムでWalter Dennysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1518年10月22日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアアルベストンで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Danvers(이)가 1445년 1월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 p웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Danvers(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agnes de La Bere(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1464년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 디람에서 Walter Dennys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1518년 10월 22일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 앨베스턴에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Danvers родилась 1 января 1445 г. в местности эпвелл, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Danvers было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Agnes de La Bere, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Dennys около 1464 г. в местности дирам, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 22 октября 1518 г. в местности алвестон, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 73 лет.
